arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Cardiff City vs. Swansea City
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Cardiff City vs. Swansea City.

arts.ttl: Here’s how the Connacht players rated in their win over Cardiff
arts.sum: Set up bonus point try with a sublime break for replacement scrum-half Matthew Devine to crown a solid display as he heads into Six Nations camp with the kid brother. All of his Irish teammates outside Connacht will be coming in off Champions Cup action but Aki has made the most of the second tier competition over the past two weekends and created the opening three tries in this one on a night when he made 24 carries.

arts.ttl: FA Cup: Chelsea, Man Utd, Liverpool and Tottenham new dates revealed as fourth round TV schedule is announced
arts.sum: Some intriguing ties will take place in the fourth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Swansea City transfer bulletin as Middlesbrough star linked and Jamie Paterson training with rivals
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Coventry City boss Frank Lampard has confirmed that former Swans star Jamie Paterson is training with the club. According to Football League World, the 23-year-old is on the radar in SA1, as Luke Williams bids to strengthen his options ahead of the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Swansea City poised to keep hold of player until the end of the season

arts.ttl: Struggles at Cardiff City don’t stop January transfer – Club convinced they’ll turn him around
arts.sum: Dinamo Zagreb are set to complete a deal for Cardiff City striker Wilfried Kanga, who will be sent back to Hertha Berlin first. That’s according to 24 Sata, who report that Kanga is set to sign a three-year deal with the Croatian side.
